title: HostedMediaStoragePath
description: User-owned club and event media staged at users/{uid}/hostedMedia/{fileName}. Writes only require the uploader's authenticated uid; attaching the resulting URL to clubs/events is authorized by Cloud Functions.
x-storage-read: public (download URLs are used for public club/event media)
x-storage-write: owner (uid path segment must equal request.auth.uid)

uid.description: Firebase Auth uid of the uploading host; path segment.
